description.zh-Hans: 使用物理粒子模拟生成降雪效果。雪花受重力、风力和水平摇摆影响下落，渲染为柔和的白色圆点并带有像素艺术量化。由时间参数（0-1）驱动动画。输出可平铺。
description.en: Generates snowfall using physical particle simulation. Snowflakes fall with gravity, wind, and horizontal sway, rendered as soft white circles with pixel-art quantization. Driven by a time parameter (0-1) for animation. Output is tileable.

triggers.zh-Hans: 下雪, 雪景, 暴风雪, 雪花, 冬季天气, 降雪效果
triggers.en: snow, snowfall, blizzard, snowflake, winter weather, snow effect

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成降雪动画帧，用于冬季场景天气效果或动态背景。
exampleUsage.en: Generate snowfall animation frames for winter scene weather effects or dynamic backgrounds.
